title: 2-file commit touching auth hook files that have no tests in the repository
commit_message: feat: strengthen username validation in signUpForm; add OTP digit constraints

why_dead_zone.explanation: Neither src/features/auth/hooks/signUpFormHook.ts nor src/features/auth/hooks/useOtpValidationHook.ts appears in any test's sources[] array in test-manifest.json. The test repository has zero coverage of the signup flow and OTP validation hook. Despite real business-logic changes (new empty check, min-length, reserved word guard, 6-digit OTP constraint), the system finds NO matching tests.
why_dead_zone.contrast_with_signInFormHook: signInFormHook.ts IS covered — the 4 'validateEmailOrUsername' tests in auth-storage.cross.test.js list it in sources[]. signUpFormHook.ts and useOtpValidationHook.ts were never added to the manifest.
why_dead_zone.system_output: ALL SKIP + 4 COVERAGE GAPS emitted. No test run command is generated.

SKIP.reason: Neither changed file appears in any sources[] entry in test-manifest.json
skipped_files: test_repository/cross-dependent/auth-storage.cross.test.js  (sources: signInFormHook.ts + constants.ts + utilities.js + storage.ts — signUpFormHook NOT listed)

coverage_gaps.severity: HIGH — business logic change with no safety net
new_behaviours_added: Empty / whitespace-only username now returns 'Username is required'
Username shorter than 3 chars returns 'Username must be at least 3 characters'
Username 'admin' (case-insensitive) is now a reserved word
recommended_tests: returns error for an empty username string
returns error for a whitespace-only username
returns error for a username shorter than 3 characters
returns error for the reserved username 'admin'
returns error for the reserved username 'ADMIN' (case-insensitive)
returns undefined for a valid username

coverage_gaps.severity: HIGH — validation constraints tightened with no test coverage
new_behaviours_added: minLength: 6 — OTP shorter than 6 digits now triggers an error
maxLength: 6 — OTP longer than 6 digits now triggers an error
pattern: /^[0-9]{6}$/ — non-numeric OTP now triggers an error
recommended_tests: OTP field accepts exactly 6 numeric digits
OTP field rejects input shorter than 6 digits
OTP field rejects input longer than 6 digits
OTP field rejects a non-numeric input like 'abc123'
OTP field returns 'OTP is required' when empty

coverage_gaps.action_required: Add signUpFormHook.ts to sources[] in test-manifest.json for any future signup-related tests
Add useOtpValidationHook.ts to sources[] in test-manifest.json for any future OTP-related tests

system_behaviour_guide.no_jest_run: Because CRITICAL + HIGH + LOW = 0, the jest run command is empty. No tests are executed.
system_behaviour_guide.critical_insight: A passing test run does NOT mean the commit is safe. In this scenario, 0 tests run but 2 functions with real validation logic changed. The gap report is the only signal the system can produce.
system_behaviour_guide.recommendation: Before merging, the gap report must be reviewed. The 4 recommended test suites must be written and added to the test repository with correct sources[] entries.

jest_run_note: No tests matched — nothing to run. Gap report is the only output.
